verdict.answer_first: B opens cleaner: "Go with **Tailwind** for this case"; A also answers first but softens with "but let me give you the real trade-offs".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits harder: "don't mix both as your primary approach"; A dilutes with "middle path" and "vanilla-extract".
verdict.fabrication: B invents unverifiable specifics: "days, not weeks" and overbroad "most modern component libraries assume Tailwind"; A has softer unsupported claims like "very popular".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on: pick Tailwind, add "prettier-plugin-tailwindcss", avoid mixing systems, use CSS modules only for occasional complex cases.
